verses.king_james: A prayer of Habakkuk the prophet upon Shigionoth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, audivi auditionem tuam, et timui.  Domine, opus tuum, in medio annorum vivifica illud ;  in medio annorum notum facies :  cum iratus fueris, misericordiæ recordaberis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֗ה שָׁמַ֣עְתִּי שִׁמְעֲךָ֮ יָרֵ֒אתִי֒ יְהֹוָ֗ה פׇּֽעׇלְךָ֙ בְּקֶ֤רֶב שָׁנִים֙ חַיֵּ֔יהוּ בְּקֶ֥רֶב שָׁנִ֖ים תּוֹדִ֑יעַ בְּרֹ֖גֶז רַחֵ֥ם תִּזְכּֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: O Lord, I have heard thy speech, and was afraid: O Lord, revive thy work in the midst of the years, in the midst of the years make known; in wrath remember mercy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus ab austro veniet,  et Sanctus de monte Pharan :  operuit cælos gloria ejus,  et laudis ejus plena est terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱל֙וֹהַּ֙ מִתֵּימָ֣ן יָב֔וֹא וְקָד֥וֹשׁ מֵהַר־פָּארָ֖ן סֶ֑לָה כִּסָּ֤ה שָׁמַ֙יִם֙ הוֹד֔וֹ וּתְהִלָּת֖וֹ מָלְאָ֥ה הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: God came from Teman, and the Holy One from mount Paran. Selah. His glory covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Splendor ejus ut lux erit,  cornua in manibus ejus :  ibi abscondita est fortitudo ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנֹ֙גַהּ֙ כָּא֣וֹר תִּֽהְיֶ֔ה קַרְנַ֥יִם מִיָּד֖וֹ ל֑וֹ וְשָׁ֖ם חֶבְי֥וֹן עֻזֹּֽה׃
verses.king_james: And his brightness was as the light; he had horns coming out of his hand: and there was the hiding of his power.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ante faciem ejus ibit mors,  et egredietur diabolus ante pedes ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְפָנָ֖יו יֵ֣לֶךְ דָּ֑בֶר וְיֵצֵ֥א רֶ֖שֶׁף לְרַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Before him went the pestilence, and burning coals went forth at his feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Stetit, et mensus est terram ;  aspexit, et dissolvit gentes,  et contriti sunt montes sæculi :  incurvati sunt colles mundi ab itineribus æternitatis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָמַ֣ד ׀ וַיְמֹ֣דֶד אֶ֗רֶץ רָאָה֙ וַיַּתֵּ֣ר גּוֹיִ֔ם וַיִּתְפֹּֽצְצוּ֙ הַרְרֵי־עַ֔ד שַׁח֖וּ גִּבְע֣וֹת עוֹלָ֑ם הֲלִיכ֥וֹת עוֹלָ֖ם לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: He stood, and measured the earth: he beheld, and drove asunder the nations; and the everlasting mountains were scattered, the perpetual hills did bow: his ways are everlasting.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pro iniquitate vidi tentoria Æthiopiæ ;  turbabuntur pelles terræ Madian.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּ֣חַת אָ֔וֶן רָאִ֖יתִי אׇהֳלֵ֣י כוּשָׁ֑ן יִרְגְּז֕וּן יְרִיע֖וֹת אֶ֥רֶץ מִדְיָֽן׃
verses.king_james: I saw the tents of Cushan in affliction: and the curtains of the land of Midian did tremble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid in fluminibus iratus es, Domine ?  aut in fluminibus furor tuus ?  vel in mari indignatio tua ?  Qui ascendes super equos tuos, et quadrigæ tuæ salvatio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲבִנְהָרִים֙ חָרָ֣ה יְהֹוָ֔ה אִ֤ם בַּנְּהָרִים֙ אַפֶּ֔ךָ אִם־בַּיָּ֖ם עֶבְרָתֶ֑ךָ כִּ֤י תִרְכַּב֙ עַל־סוּסֶ֔יךָ מַרְכְּבֹתֶ֖יךָ יְשׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Was the Lord displeased against the rivers? was thine anger against the rivers? was thy wrath against the sea, that thou didst ride upon thine horses and thy chariots of salvation?

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscitans suscitabis arcum tuum,  juramenta tribubus quæ locutus es ;  fluvios scindes terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֶרְיָ֤ה תֵעוֹר֙ קַשְׁתֶּ֔ךָ שְׁבֻע֥וֹת מַטּ֖וֹת אֹ֣מֶר סֶ֑לָה נְהָר֖וֹת תְּבַקַּע־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Thy bow was made quite naked, according to the oaths of the tribes, even thy word. Selah. Thou didst cleave the earth with rivers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viderunt te, et doluerunt montes ;  gurges aquarum transiit :  dedit abyssus vocem suam ;  altitudo manus suas levavit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָא֤וּךָ יָחִ֙ילוּ֙ הָרִ֔ים זֶ֥רֶם מַ֖יִם עָבָ֑ר נָתַ֤ן תְּהוֹם֙ קוֹל֔וֹ ר֖וֹם יָדֵ֥יהוּ נָשָֽׂא׃
verses.king_james: The mountains saw thee, and they trembled: the overflowing of the water passed by: the deep uttered his voice, and lifted up his hands on high.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sol et luna steterunt in habitaculo suo :  in luce sagittarum tuarum ibunt,  in splendore fulgurantis hastæ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֶׁ֥מֶשׁ יָרֵ֖חַ עָ֣מַד זְבֻ֑לָה לְא֤וֹר חִצֶּ֙יךָ֙ יְהַלֵּ֔כוּ לְנֹ֖גַהּ בְּרַ֥ק חֲנִיתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: The sun and moon stood still in their habitation: at the light of thine arrows they went, and at the shining of thy glittering spear.

verses.latin_vulgate: In fremitu conculcabis terram ;  in furore obstupefacies gentes.
verses.king_james: Thou didst march through the land in indignation, thou didst thresh the heathen in anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressus es in salutem populi tui,  in salutem cum christo tuo :  percussisti caput de domo impii,  denudasti fundamentum ejus usque ad collum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָצָ֙אתָ֙ לְיֵ֣שַׁע עַמֶּ֔ךָ לְיֵ֖שַׁע אֶת־מְשִׁיחֶ֑ךָ מָחַ֤צְתָּ רֹּאשׁ֙ מִבֵּ֣ית רָשָׁ֔ע עָר֛וֹת יְס֥וֹד עַד־צַוָּ֖אר סֶֽלָה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Thou wentest forth for the salvation of thy people, even for salvation with thine anointed; thou woundedst the head out of the house of the wicked, by discovering the foundation unto the neck. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Maledixisti sceptris ejus,  capiti bellatorum ejus,  venientibus ut turbo ad dispergendum me :  exsultatio eorum, sicut ejus qui devorat pauperem in abscondito.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָקַ֤בְתָּ בְמַטָּיו֙ רֹ֣אשׁ פְּרָזָ֔ו יִסְעֲר֖וּ לַהֲפִיצֵ֑נִי עֲלִ֣יצֻתָ֔ם כְּמוֹ־לֶאֱכֹ֥ל עָנִ֖י בַּמִּסְתָּֽר׃
verses.king_james: Thou didst strike through with his staves the head of his villages: they came out as a whirlwind to scatter me: their rejoicing was as to devour the poor secretly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viam fecisti in mari equis tuis,  in luto aquarum multarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דָּרַ֥כְתָּ בַיָּ֖ם סוּסֶ֑יךָ חֹ֖מֶר מַ֥יִם רַבִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: Thou didst walk through the sea with thine horses, through the heap of great waters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audivi, et conturbatus est venter meus ;  a voce contremuerunt labia mea.  Ingrediatur putredo in ossibus meis,  et subter me scateat :  ut requiescam in die tribulationis,  ut ascendam ad populum accinctum nostrum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁמַ֣עְתִּי ׀ וַתִּרְגַּ֣ז בִּטְנִ֗י לְקוֹל֙ צָלְל֣וּ שְׂפָתַ֔י יָב֥וֹא רָקָ֛ב בַּעֲצָמַ֖י וְתַחְתַּ֣י אֶרְגָּ֑ז אֲשֶׁ֤ר אָנ֙וּחַ֙ לְי֣וֹם צָרָ֔ה לַעֲל֖וֹת לְעַ֥ם יְגוּדֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: When I heard, my belly trembled; my lips quivered at the voice: rottenness entered into my bones, and I trembled in myself, that I might rest in the day of trouble: when he cometh up unto the people, he will invade them with his troops.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ficus enim non florebit,  et non erit germen in vineis ;  mentietur opus olivæ,  et arva non afferent cibum :  abscindetur de ovili pecus,  et non erit armentum in præsepibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־תְאֵנָ֣ה לֹֽא־תִפְרָ֗ח וְאֵ֤ין יְבוּל֙ בַּגְּפָנִ֔ים כִּחֵשׁ֙ מַֽעֲשֵׂה־זַ֔יִת וּשְׁדֵמ֖וֹת לֹא־עָ֣שָׂה אֹ֑כֶל גָּזַ֤ר מִמִּכְלָה֙ צֹ֔אן וְאֵ֥ין בָּקָ֖ר בָּרְפָתִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Although the fig tree shall not blossom, neither shall fruit be in the vines; the labour of the olive shall fail, and the fields shall yield no meat; the flock shall be cut off from the fold, and there shall be no herd in the stalls:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem in Domino gaudebo ;  et exsultabo in Deo Jesu meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֖י בַּיהֹוָ֣ה אֶעְל֑וֹזָה אָגִ֖ילָה בֵּאלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׁעִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Yet I will rejoice in the Lord, I will joy in the God of my salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus Dominus fortitudo mea,  et ponet pedes meos quasi cervorum :  et super excelsa mea deducet me  victor in psalmis canentem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֱהֹוִ֤ה אֲדֹנָי֙ חֵילִ֔י וַיָּ֤שֶׂם רַגְלַי֙ כָּאַיָּל֔וֹת וְעַ֥ל בָּמוֹתַ֖י יַדְרִכֵ֑נִי לַמְנַצֵּ֖חַ בִּנְגִינוֹתָֽי׃
verses.king_james: The Lord God is my strength, and he will make my feet like hinds’ feet, and he will make me to walk upon mine high places. To the chief singer on my stringed instruments.
